metadata.description: Frozen evaluation corpus for breakability CI policy validation
metadata.note: These cases represent known breakability ground truth from the live merge plan #122. All PR numbers refer to this snapshot.

cases.notes: Breaking API change: function signature altered. Build fails, test suite catches it.
Supply-chain signal: author changed, requires human verification even though patch version.
Conservative: behavioral changes in retry logic not fully covered by probes. Requires review.
CVE patch: test suite passes, no interface changes, minimal delta.
Test suite exists but not verified clean in sandbox. Requires human review to confirm.
